overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from a sci-fi survival game showing an astronaut exploring a dark, foggy industrial facility. The character ascends metal stairs, passes through a red-lit airlock to an exterior platform, retrieves a pulse rifle from a parked rover, and returns inside through the same airlock.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark industrial corridor with metal walkways

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously through the dark foggy corridor, sweeping flashlight to illuminate the path ahead

entered.detail: metal safety railing running along the right side of the walkway
large cylindrical pipes lying on the ground
rough stone wall visible through the fog on the left side
metal staircase with yellow hazard stripes visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, foggy industrial corridor with metal railings on the right and pipes scattered on the concrete floor. The flashlight illuminates the path ahead, revealing a rock wall to the left and a metal staircase in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed metal stairwell with hazard markings

events.description: character begins ascending the metal staircase with yellow hazard stripes

agents.ego_description: climbing the metal staircase, holding the railing while sweeping the flashlight upward

entered.detail: yellow and black diagonal warning stripes on the stair edges
red emergency light glowing at the top of the stairwell
metal landing platform visible at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the metal staircase marked with yellow hazard stripes, moving from the ground floor toward an upper platform. The red emergency light at the top of the stairs becomes more prominent as the character climbs.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper platform with red-lit airlock door

events.description: environment shifts to intense red emergency lighting as character approaches the airlock
character opens the heavy industrial airlock door revealing the exterior platform

agents.ego_description: approaching the large red-lit industrial door, interacting with the control panel to open it

entered.detail: large heavy industrial door illuminated by red emergency lighting with circular locking mechanism
warning placard mounted on the wall next to the door
open-air platform with safety railings visible through the opening door
metal safety railing along the edge of the exterior platform

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the upper platform dominated by a large industrial airlock door bathed in red emergency lighting. After interacting with the door controls, the heavy door opens to reveal an exterior platform with safety railings and a foggy outdoor environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: exterior industrial platform with parked rover

events.description: character stops at the rover and enters the vehicle to retrieve equipment
character retrieves a pulse rifle from the vehicle's center console storage compartment

agents.ego_description: approaching the parked rover, opening the door, entering the cabin, and retrieving a weapon from the storage compartment

notable_agents.action: large six-wheeled rover parked on the platform with headlights on, door opening for the character

entered.detail: large white six-wheeled exploration rover with illuminated headlights
metal safety railing running along the left side of the platform
red warning beacon mounted on a pole in the distance
interior cabin of the rover with seats and control panels
control dashboard with illuminated screens inside the rover
center console storage compartment containing the pulse rifle

segments.scene_description: The character walks across the exterior platform toward a large six-wheeled rover parked in the fog. After entering the vehicle, the character opens the center console storage compartment and retrieves a pulse rifle, then exits the rover to begin the return journey.

scene_state.functional_zone: return path through airlock to interior

events.description: character re-enters the interior facility through the red-lit airlock door

agents.ego_description: walking away from the rover, re-entering the facility through the airlock, and returning to the upper platform

entered.detail: same heavy industrial door now approached from the exterior side
interior corridor bathed in red emergency lighting

segments.scene_description: The character walks back across the exterior platform, passing through the red-lit airlock door to return to the interior. The character approaches the metal stairs, completing the retrieval mission and returning to the upper platform area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic industrial interior out onto a foggy exterior platform and back again. It begins in a narrow, foggy corridor where a flashlight cuts through the gloom to reveal concrete floors and pipes before the camera ascends a yellow-striped metal staircase. As the character climbs, the dim lighting shifts toward a prominent red emergency glow that dominates the upper platform and the heavy industrial airlock door. The scene then opens as the airlock slides away to reveal a misty outdoor environment, where the camera follows the character to a six-wheeled rover to retrieve a pulse rifle from its center console. Finally, the movement reverses as the character walks back across the exterior platform and passes through the red-lit airlock to return to the interior stairs.
